metadata.title: YieldVault - Maximize Your DeFi Returns
metadata.description: Professional DeFi yield vault with auto-compounding strategies and 5-level referral system. Earn up to 23.5% APY on Polygon.

hero.subtitle: Automated yield farming with Aave, QuickSwap, and more. Earn up to {apy} APY with auto-compounding and a 5-level referral program.

howItWorks.title: How It
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting started with YieldVault is simple. Deposit your USDT and let our smart contracts do the heavy lifting.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Connect your wallet and deposit USDT. Your funds are immediately deployed into yield-generating strategies.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our smart contracts automatically harvest rewards and compound them back into your position for maximum yield.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Watch your balance grow. Share your referral link to earn commissions on 5 levels of referrals.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Your funds are never locked. Withdraw at any time with no penalties. Full control, always.

strategies.title: Yield
strategies.subtitle: Your USDT is automatically allocated across multiple strategies for optimal risk-adjusted returns.

aave.name: Aave Leveraged Lending
aave.description: Supply USDT to Aave with controlled leverage (up to 2x) for enhanced yields. Automated health factor monitoring ensures position safety.

quickswap.name: QuickSwap LP
quickswap.description: Provide liquidity to USDT/MATIC pools on QuickSwap. Earn trading fees plus QUICK rewards that are auto-compounded.

stablecoin.name: Stablecoin Strategies
stablecoin.description: Conservative strategies using stable-stable pools and lending protocols. Perfect for risk-averse depositors.

referral.title: 5-Level
referral.subtitle: Earn passive income by referring others. Get commissions on deposits AND on their yield earnings forever.
referral.commissionNote: Commissions are distributed from the deposit fee (0.5%) and from referred users' yield earnings
referral.depositDesc: Instant commissions when your referrals deposit. Earn from the 0.5% deposit fee distributed across 5 levels.
referral.yieldDesc: Recurring commissions from your referrals' yield earnings. Keep earning as long as they stay invested.

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.receiveShares: You will receive yvSHARE tokens representing your stake

footer.description: Maximize your USDT yield with automated strategies on Polygon. Secure, transparent, and community-driven.
footer.disclaimerText: DeFi investments carry significant risks including smart contract vulnerabilities, market volatility, and impermanent loss. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Only invest what you can afford to lose. This is not financial advice.
